blended.narrative: Winter Park is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 11.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 15" over the past week. Current depth: 46".
